items.summary: Update Home.tsx to fetch posts from backend using backendActor.getFeed() and display them in a feed layout with max-w-2xl centered container on gray-100 background
Implement automatic feed refresh in Home.tsx that polls backendActor.getFeed() every 5 seconds using setInterval in useEffect
Display comments section below each PostCard in Home.tsx showing all existing comments with author name and text, using font-semibold for author and text-sm text-gray-700 for comment text
Add comment input form below comments list in Home.tsx with text input field and 'Post' button, supporting Enter key submission and per-post comment text state management
Implement handleAddComment function in Home.tsx that calls backendActor.addComment(postId, text), clears the input field, and refreshes the feed

Implement addComment backend function in main.mo that accepts postId (Nat), text (Text), and author (Principal), creates comment with timestamp, adds it to the post's comments list, and returns Bool indicating success

Define TypeScript type interfaces in Home.tsx for Comment with author (string), text (string), and createdAt (number), and Post with id (number), author (any/Principal), content (string), mediaUrl (string), likes (any[]), comments (Comment[]), and createdAt (number)
